conversation.text: Hey Louis, mark here from markeye. I just saw that you checked out the demo, so I wanted to reach out straight away. Was this regarding Horizon Estates?
yeah thats us
nice one, what made you want to check it out if you don’t mind me asking
hey idk i got one of your emails and its quite relevant to us so interested to hear more
yeah fair enough, so what do you guys do at Horizon Estates exactly
residential real estate sales
oh great, are you running ads at the moment then or is it more organic and referrals
both, we get a lot of site clicks and enquiries but we also run some ads for new builds
Interesting… quick one, roughly how many leads we talking per month, like tens or hundreds
i mean just talking enquiries overall then yeah hundreds easily
and what happens when those come in right now, is there a team picking them up orrr
yeah well because its a real estate agency we have sales teams ofc, but after 5pm office is empty so they sit there till the morning

yeah we hear that a lot. We normally hear one of a few things… It’s either speed to lead is poor, follow up are inconsistent, or lead qualification is poor, especially in real estate we see this a lot. Out of interest which would you say was the biggest pain point right now?
Honestly all 3 could be better, but mostly speed to lead and qualification is always an issue.
have you looked into automating this before or is this the first time
first time really, we use some email stuff but nothing for catching leads live on whatsapp or email

makes sense, to be honest most clients normally come to use either because it’s a gap they want to close or they have tried the other solutions available but they just weren’t up to standard, but it sounds like the gap is pretty clear for you then.
yeah basically

I mean I think the next step I would recommend is booking in a discovery call with our founder, Louis, but before I send you a link was there anything you want to know first
|||
Ps Price, ROI and checking if we are the right fit can all be discussed on the call
okay great but I would like to know how much it costs

Yeah sure, It can be rather scope based so I can't give you an exact number here, depends what needs building, what integrations or number of channels and compliance etc etc. Usually comes in under a month of ad spend though, and it's mainly a one off build fee and we split it 50/50 so not all upfront
|||
Hope that helps, just let me know if there is anything else I can help with.
ok and how long does it take

sure, usually 2 to 3 weeks depending on scope. The founder, Louis, handles all the strategy calls, he'd walk you through exactly how it would work for Horizon Estates and give you a proper timeline and quote on the call
ok yeah sounds good
cool, want me to send the link now
yes please

https://calendly.com/markeye/free-discovery-call
|||
just grab any time that works best for you
booked
Seen it's booked in. I’ll inform Louis and ping him any necessary details before you speak.
